background.origin: Former mercenary. Worked alone after losing multiple parties, but has formed a team again.
background.motivation: Learned through experience that protecting allies is the best strategy. This time, he won't lose anyone.
background.personality: The quiet type who acts first. Plans strategy only in his head and shows it through action.

relationships.seraphine: Party healer. Someone he can trust to cover the rear.
relationships.yeoul: Party rogue. Someone he needs to shield from the front.

appearance.outfit: worn chainmail, iron sword on back, leather shield on left arm
appearance.notable: old scars visible above the armor
